headline: Mosaic Eyes 2030 Production With Uberaba Rare Earths Facility
summary: The Mosaic Company shares are up on Wednesday amid concern that the ongoing closure of the Strait of Hormuz will limit exports from key Middle East producers Saudi Arabia and the UAE. Also, the company disclosed a positive development regarding...

headline: Investing.com’s stocks of the week
summary: Investing.com -- With the Middle East conflict continuing, investors have had to contend with another volatile week. The closure of the Strait of Hormuz has significantly impacted oil markets and other sectors.
